title.en: And this group of people caused a sensation!

content.en:
After waiting for a while, another group of god-level generals came over under the leadership of several Heavenly Monarchs.

And this group of people caused a sensation!

"The people from the God of War Tower are here!"

Many gods and heavenly monarchs looked at it one after another.

Even Peng Yu Tianjun looked over, and his eyes were focused on a young god general.

All around, the sound of the gods discussing came into Ye Tian's ears.

"The Cloud Purple Divine Maiden of the God of War Tower is also here, isn't the God of War Tower afraid of the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden falling in this secret world?"

"Hahaha, the Yunzi Divine Maiden is the personal disciple of the Dao Ancestor behind the God of War Tower, there must be a lot of life-saving treasures on her body, how can she fall easily. "

"It is rumored that Yun Zi Divine Maiden's talent is very good, she has cultivated to the combat power of a six-star god general in just 100,000 years, and it is said that she has the potential to become an eight-star god general, I don't know if it's true or not?"

"It should be true, I don't know why this Tianjiao came here, although the ancestral monument is a great opportunity against the sky, but it is only for the true ancestors, for us, although this great universe is a place of great opportunity, it is difficult to attract a real top Tianjiao. Yun Zi Divine Maiden stays here, it is difficult to leave in a short period of time, how can she obtain precious resources and the best cultivation? The cultivation level of a great universe is definitely not comparable to the countless experiences in the chaos!"

"Who knows, maybe the Yunzi Divine Maiden also wants to seek the ancestral monument, in case she is also promoted to the true ancestor realm before the birth of the Dao realm, wouldn't she also be qualified to compete for the ancestral monument place?"

As these people discussed, Ye Tian gradually understood the identity of this Yunzi Goddess.

Dao Ancestor's own disciple!

What a glory and status this is!

Wow!

Ye Tian's copying talent enveloped this Cloud Purple Goddess, and when she saw the other party's talent, she was immediately shocked.

This Cloud Purple Divine Maiden's cultivation talent is also a supreme cultivation talent, and she has multiple extreme talents and super god-level talents, and even the three basic talents have become origin talents.

What's more, this Cloud Purple Divine Maiden also has a supernatural talent, and her level has reached the god level.

【Transcendent Talent: God-level (Extreme)】

The super-comprehension talent of the god-level limit, what an anti-heaven increase effect this gives to comprehension.

"No wonder Yun Zi Divine Maiden's talent and potential are so high, she actually has such a talent!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

All along, his comprehension has been a flaw, compared to the average god general, it is indeed very good, but compared to the real Tianjiao in the chaos, it is very ordinary.

It is precisely because it is difficult to improve his comprehension that he has not been able to comprehend the Void Heaven Diagram so far.

If he obtains this god-level extreme transcendent comprehension talent, he can quickly comprehend the Void Heaven Diagram, and has a glimmer of hope to completely comprehend the Void Heaven Diagram, thus becoming the personal disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

"Transcendent talent, copy!"

Ye Tianyinian copied successfully.

When the supernatural talent was in hand, Ye Tian's heart was shocked, and he was extremely excited, but he couldn't help laughing.

However, Peng Yu Tianjun on the side noticed Ye Tian's state and gaze, and thought that Ye Tian was moved by the Yun Zi Divine Maiden, so he said: "Senior Brother Ye Tian, don't you have a crush on the Yun Zi Divine Maiden? I advise you to give up this idea, I don't know how many geniuses in the chaos want to marry the Yun Zi Divine Maiden, but they are not worthy." A genius like Xiang Yunzi Divine Maiden will become a true ancestor in the future, and he is not an ordinary true ancestor, he is an invincible true ancestor who is extremely powerful among the true ancestors, and is even expected to fight with the Dao Ancestor!"

"Senior Brother Pengyu is too worried, Senior Brother, I don't have this idea!"

Ye Tian hurriedly explained.

Senior Brother Peng Yu didn't speak, just showed a look that you can't fool me.

Seeing this, Ye Tian was also quite speechless.

He is a person with a wife, and he will not like other people casually, but it is useless to talk to Peng Yu Tianjun.

Misunderstanding is misunderstanding!

After another half a month, this secret realm world finally opened again, and the Heavenly Monarchs who were guarding the entrance left one by one.

Rumble!!!

The portal opened, and a famous god general poured into the secret world.

Before entering, Peng Yu Tianjun sent a voice to remind: "Senior Brother Ye Tian, if you are really in danger, you can send a distress message to the nearby disciples of the Void Heaven Palace!"

"Thank you, Senior Brother Pengyu!"

Ye Tiandao.

Immediately, he flew into the Great World of the Secret Realm.

A large number of gods poured into the Great World of the Secret Realm, and soon they scattered and flew in all directions.

The rules of this secret realm world are also very strong, Ye Tiangang entered here, and he was a little uncomfortable, but he didn't care about these uncomfortable reactions, but quickly shuttled away with his constant light divine power.

He is just a five-star god general, and he has not offended any big people, so no one deliberately targets him, or follows him, and does that murderous and treasure-stealing thing.

Soon.

Ye Tian flew into a mountain range, immediately hidden, and then used a magic power to escape from the earth, escaped into the ground, opened up a small space underground, and then arranged the concealment formation, preparing to retreat here for a period of time.

After everything was ready, Ye Tian began to fuse that one talent.

It takes about half an hour for each talent to be fused, and so many talents naturally take a lot of time.

Time passed little by little, and about half a month passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally fused all those talents, and the whole person underwent a huge transformation.

At this time, his talent is incomparably gorgeous-

Host: Ye Tian

Cultivation Talent: Advanced

Source Force Talent: Super God Level (Extreme)

Source Talent: Super God Level (Extreme)

Source Talent: Super God (Extreme)

Source Knife Talent: No superior

Source Sword Talent: No superior

Source space-time talent: Super god level

Source Fire Talent: Super God Level (Extreme)

Source Land Talent: Super God (Extreme)

Source Gold Talent: Super God Level (Extreme)

Genki Talent: Super God Level (Extreme)

Source Water Talent: Super God Level (Extreme)

Source Immortal Talent: God-level

Yuan Hengguang talent: God level

Source Annihilation Talent: God-level

Source Thunder Talent: God-level (Extreme)

Source Dark Talent: God-level (Extreme)

Transcendent Talent: God-level (Extreme)

......

The super god-level inert armor talent and the super god-level chaos battle body talent have not yet been fused, and several other fusion talents also need to be re-fused, and they can also be turned into extreme fusion talents.

As a result, Ye Tian began to use the copying talent to fuse, and turned on time acceleration.

There is no limit to the opening time of this secret world, which means that as long as this secret world is not destroyed, you can stay here forever.

After all, there is no way for the major forces to jointly take charge of a secret world, and there are countless opportunities for the future universe, so there is no need to stare at a big world.

Therefore, this secret realm is regarded as a development world.

It's just that the first time you enter the secret world, you will gain the most, and when this secret world is almost developed, there will be very few resources and treasures, and the value of this secret world will naturally not be too high.

Ye Tian didn't collect resources at the best time, but fused talents here, which was undoubtedly a waste of time.

But Ye Tian also knew very well that his strength was too weak, and he couldn't snatch those god generals at all.

Rather than this, it is better to fuse talents here, and when all the fusion is completed, his strength will inevitably skyrocket.

Time passed slowly, and decades passed in the blink of an eye.

Ye Tian also finally completed the fusion of talents, and the Source Immortal Talent, the Source Hengguang Talent, and the Source Annihilation Talent were all promoted to super god-level extreme talents, truly completing the transformation.

Due to the transformation of these three talents, Ye Tian's three great divine powers are also much more powerful.

Originally, Ye Tian's strength was only equivalent to the mid-five-star god general, but now his strength has undergone earth-shaking changes, and he has reached the peak of the five-star late stage god general's combat power, and he is only one step away from the five-star peak.
